_metadata.description: First-order decay constants and soil partition coefficients for common OSSF effluent indicator constituents.
sources: USEPA (2002). Onsite Wastewater Treatment Systems Manual. EPA/625/R-00/008.
Pang, L. (2009). Microbial removal rates in subsurface media estimated from published studies. J. Environ. Qual. 38:1531-1559.
John, D.E. and Rose, J.B. (2005). Review of factors affecting microbial survival in groundwater. Environ. Sci. Technol. 39:7345-7356.
USEPA Soil Screening Guidance (1996), Part 5 Soil-Water Partition Coefficients.

units.lambda_per_day: first-order die-off / decay constant [1/day], C(t) = C0*exp(-lambda*t)
units.Kd_L_per_kg: soil-water partition coefficient [L/kg]; retardation R = 1 + (rho_b * Kd) / theta
units.typical_C0: representative effluent concentration after secondary aerobic treatment + disinfection
units.regulatory_limit: TCEQ / EPA-derived screening limit at receptor

fecal_coliform.limit_basis: TCEQ surface water contact recreation; conservative receptor screen

bod5.limit_basis: TCEQ Ch. 285 secondary effluent discharge target
